steps.title: Identify the angles in the triangle
steps.content: The right triangle has three interior angles: 90° (the right angle at the bottom left), 24° (at the top), and $a$ (at the bottom right, which we need to find).

steps.title: Apply the angle sum property
steps.content:
The sum of interior angles in any triangle is 180°. Setting up the equation:

$$90° + 24° + a = 180°$$

Solving for $a$:
$$a = 180° - 90° - 24° = 66°$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
